option.name: prompt
option.value: Write a unit test for this code using JUnit.

option.name: prompt
option.value: Break down the code in simple terms to help a junior developer grasp its functionality.

option.name: prompt
option.value: Review the selected code, can it be improved or are there any bugs?

option.name: prompt
option.value: You are a professional Java developer. Give me a SINGLE FILE COMPLETE java implementation that will pass this test. Do not respond with a test. Give me only complete code and no snippets. Include imports and use the right package.

option.name: prompt
option.value: Perform semantic search on the project files using RAG and show matching files. (NOTE: The /find command requires RAG to be enabled in settings)

option.name: prompt
option.value: Display help and available commands for the Genie Devoxx Plugin

option.name: prompt
option.value: Initialize or recreate the DEVOXXGENIE.md file in the project root.

option.name: modelConfigCachedJson
option.value: { "schemaVersion": 1, "lastUpdated": "2026-04-10", "_sources": { "Anthropic": "https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/docs/about-claude/models", "OpenAI": "https://platform.openai.com/docs/models", "Google": "https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/models", "Mistral": "https://docs.mistral.ai/getting-started/models/models_overview/", "Grok": "https://docs.x.ai/developers/models", "Groq": "https://console.groq.com/docs/models", "DeepInfra": "https://deepinfra.com/models", "DeepSeek": "https://api-docs.deepseek.com/quick_start/pricing", "Bedrock": "https://docs.aws.amazon.com/bedrock/latest/userguide/models-supported.html", "GLM": "https://docs.bigmodel.cn/", "Kimi": "https://platform.kimi.com/docs/pricing" }, "providers": { "Anthropic": [ { "modelName": "claude-haiku-4-5-20251001", "displayName": "Claude 4.5 Haiku (20251001)", "inputCost": 1, "outputCost": 5, "inputMaxTokens": 200000, "outputMaxTokens": 64000, "apiKeyUsed": true }, { "modelName": "claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929", "displayName": "Claude 4.5 Sonnet (20250929)", "inputCost": 3, "outputCost": 15, "inputMaxTokens": 200000, "outputMaxTokens": 64000, "apiKeyUsed": true }, { "modelName": "claude-opus-4-5-20251101", "displayName": "Claude 4.5 Opus (20251101)", "inputCost": 5, "outputCost": 25, "inputMaxTokens": 200000, "outputMaxTokens": 64000, "apiKeyUsed": true }, { "modelName": "claude-opus-4-6", "displayName": "Claude 4.6 Opus", "inputCost": 5, "outputCost": 25, "inputMaxTokens": 1000000, "outputMaxTokens": 128000, "apiKeyUsed": true }, { "modelName": "claude-sonnet-4-6", "displayName": "Claude 4.6 Sonnet", "inputCost": 3, "outputCost": 15, "inputMaxTokens": 1000000, "outputMaxTokens": 64000, "apiKeyUsed": true } ], "OpenAI": [ { "modelName": "gpt-5.4", "displayName": "GPT 5.4", "inputCost": 2.50, "outputCost": 15, "inputMaxTokens": 1050000, "outputMaxTokens": 128000, "apiKeyUsed": true }, { "modelName": "gpt-5.4-pro",
